zh.lifeSummary: 當Ursula Brydges於1495年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾可利時，她的父親Sir Gilles Brydges33歲，母親Isabella Baynham20歲。她於大約1520年與Sir John Sydenham MP在英國格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1576年1月在英國英格蘭薩默塞特布普頓享年81歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ursula Brydges于1495年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾可利时，她的父亲Sir Gilles Brydges33岁，母亲Isabella Baynham20岁。她于大约1520年与Sir John Sydenham MP在英国格盧斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1576年1月在英国英格兰薩默塞特布普頓享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: Brydges
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bridges
meanings: English: variant of Bridge . The -s generally represents the genitive case, but may occasionally be a plural. In some cases this name denoted someone from the Flemish city of Bruges (Brugge) in Belgium, meaning ‘bridges’, which had extensive trading links with England in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: Ursula
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin name Ursula, a diminutive of ursa ‘(she-)bear’. This was the name of a 4th-century saint martyred at Cologne with a number of companions, traditionally said to have been eleven thousand, but more probably just eleven, the exaggeration being due to a misreading of a diacritic mark in an early manuscript. This name was moderately popular in the 16th century, but its use in the English-speaking world today is selective. A more recent influence has been the film actress Ursula Andress ( b. 1936 in Switzerland).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Ursula Brydges was born in 1495, in Coberley, Gloucestershire, England, her father, Sir Gilles Brydges, was 33 and her mother, Isabella Baynham, was 20. She married Sir John Sydenham MP about 1520, in Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 7 daughters. She died in January 1576, in Brympton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ursula Brydges est née en 1495, à Coberley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Gilles Brydges, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Isabella Baynham, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Sydenham MP environ 1520, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée en janvier 1576, à Brympton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 81 ans.

Sie hat um 1520 in Gloucestershire, England Sir John Sydenham MP geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 7 Töchter. ja.lifeSummary: Ursula Brydgesが1495年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアコバーリーで生まれた時，父Sir Gilles Brydgesは33歳，母Isabella Baynhamは20歳であった。約1520年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでSir John Sydenham MPと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1576年1月にイギリスイギリスソメルセトブリンプトンで81歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ursula Brydges(이)가 1495년 영국 그루스스터실르 컵를리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Gilles Brydges(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella Baynham(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1520년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 Sir John Sydenham MP(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1576년 1월 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 브리프턴에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ursula Brydges nasceu em 1495, em Coberley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Gilles Brydges, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Baynham, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Sydenham MP aproximadamente 1520, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em janeiro de 1576, em Brympton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 81 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ursula Brydges родилась в 1495 г. в местности кобирли, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Gilles Brydges было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Isabella Baynham, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Sydenham MP около 1520 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла январь 1576 г. в местности бримптон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 81 год.

Se casó con Sir John Sydenham MP aproximadamente 1520, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió en enero de 1576, en Brympton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 81 años.
